## Kind of change

- [ ] New stack variant (`implementation-playbook.<stack>.md` or similar)
- [ ] Tightens an existing procedure (red flag, rationalization, example)
- [ ] Fixes a bug in the procedure (agent can now follow a step it couldn't before)
- [ ] Documentation / typo / link fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Tone matches the existing skill bodies (terse, opinionated, citation-demanding)
- [ ] New symbols added to the symbol legend in the same file
- [ ] Cross-references updated if I renamed or moved a file
- [ ] No runtime added (still pure markdown)
